description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: UnitTests, BoostCMakeBuild, CreateDocuTest, CreateBoostDocuTest, and CheckFormatting. Each job runs on different environments, installs dependencies, configures, builds, and tests various projects, including Boost and Nowide, with different generators, build types, and library configurations.
